title: corybas callifer
intro: Corybas callifer, also known as the "Australian greenhood orchid," is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Corybas callifer include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves can be used to make teas or infusions, and its extracts have also been used in modern medicine to create topical creams and ointments.
